1.premise: The cruelest nicknames always come from those closest to you.
A celebrity's name could qualify as a cruel fat-kid nickname.

2.premise: A fat child is like bacon because both are associated with excess fat.

3.premise: A screaming toddler is like Hitler because both got what they wanted through unhinged yelling.

4.premise: 'Benedict' sounds like 'bend-a-dick', and 'bend-a-dick' fits when someone comes out as gay.

lines.text: Hello. Has anyone got crap nicknames?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Show of hands if they have a crap nickname?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: No?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Just me? Fuck you guys. All right.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: No, I just wanted to say, 'cause, like, you know,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when you get a crap nickname, like Boogerface
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or, like, Numpy or something horrible like that...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Jelly Roll.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Maybe you could attest. Maybe you could attest.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I don't know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But it always comes from the ones you love.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know what I mean? It's never from people you hate.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, my granddad, when I was a fat kid,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: called me Buster Bacon.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Not as bad as my little brother.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He called him Adolf.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And his justification for that was,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is whenever he screamed, he got exactly what he wanted.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I mean, he could have called him Donald.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It would have worked the same.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: [ Snorts ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's all right, though. My dad sealed the name deal
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with my brother,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because my brother came out of the closet
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And his name's Benedict.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's already -- I'm British.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My brother's name's Benedict. I'm already at a good start.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And my brother on the couch just yells,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Dad, the door is ringing."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And my dad just goes, "Yeah, Benedict!"
lines.label: punchline
